name: reminder-scheduler
description: Reminder_Scheduler — sub-phase E (WS-E-REMIND). Owns the per-booking EventBridge Scheduler rule lifecycle (FROZEN_CONTRACTS §E1): create reminder + attendance schedules and their picasso-scheduled-messages rows at booking commit (§E2 cadence tiers), re-bind on token-reschedule, delete on any cancel (incl. booking.calendar_moved = cancel). Plus the E9 nightly reconciler: bounded tenantId-start_at-index scan (prior-7d, NEVER full-table) for the attendance backstop, terminal-booking schedule cleanup, and D6-outcome-(ii) orphan recovery. The dispatch CONSUMER (Scheduled_Message_Sender) already exists; this module creates the schedules + rows it reads. The EventBridge Scheduler IAM execution role is integrator glue (see DEPLOY_NOTE.md).

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
